courses.name: Options 101
courses.tagline: From greeks to verticals — a structured foundation for the modern options trader.
courses.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Options 101 is a twelve-module masterclass that walks you from contract mechanics through delta-neutral hedging using interactive payoff visualizations, live-market case studies, and a 40-question certification exam. Designed for traders who want to stop guessing and start engineering positions.
